Psikana I.name: Mental Strength
Psikana I.effect: The target can't gain Battleshock tokens by any means and loses all current tokens.

Psikana I.name: Gaze of the Emperor
Psikana I.effect: Draw a straight line 1" wide from the caster to any target point within 18". All enemy models this line passes through suffer one automatic hit with S: 6 AP: -2 D: 1; Seeking.

Psikana I.name: Psychic Barrier
Psikana I.effect: The target improves its Saving throw by +1.

Psikana I.name: Terrifying Visions
Psikana I.effect: The target must pass a Leadership test with a -1 penalty or gain a Battleshock token.

Psikana I.name: Psychic Maelstrom
Psikana I.effect: The target suffers one Mortal Wound on a 2+. If the roll was successful, it suffers one further Mortal Wound on a 3+. Repeat the process (adding +1 to the required result each time) until the roll is no longer successful.

Psikana II.name: Psychic Lash
Psikana II.effect: The target gains a melee weapon with the following profile: S: +1 AP: -3 D: 1, Flurry(2).

Psikana II.name: Telepathic Order
Psikana II.effect: The target gains any additional order.

Psikana II.name: Psychic Ward
Psikana II.effect: The target gains the "Aegis(4+) and "Warded" abilities. All terrain around the target within 6" is treated as difficult and dangerous for enemy units, even if they would normally ignore it.

Psikana II.name: Lightning Arc
Psikana II.effect: The target suffers one hit with the following profile: S: 5 AP: -1 D: 1; Barrage, Seeking.

Psikana II.name: Psychic Shackles
Psikana II.effect: The target is treated as activating in difficult and dangerous terrain, even if it would normally ignore it.
